name: EventHandler - UseSkill
description: Verify UseSkill EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Search for skill with UseSkill handler
steps.code: var found = false; var skills = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate"); foreach(var skillName in skills) { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skillName, "EventHandlers"); if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "UseSkill") { found = true; break; } } if(found) break; } } found

steps.name: Load EventHandlers from a specific skill
Verify _type field readable
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "active.use_item", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { var typeField = h.GetType().GetField("_type"); if(typeField != null) { found = true; break; } } } found

steps.name: Read SkillToUse parameter field from UseSkill
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "active.use_item", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "UseSkill") { var field = h.GetType().GetField("SkillToUse"); if(field != null) { found = true; break; } } } } found
